# Agent Meta Scripts Index

| Script | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| `add_gen23_pokemon.py` | Adds Gen 2/3 Pokemon data to the ROM hack |
| `add_trade_npcs.py` | Adds in-game trade NPC events to map scripts |
| `export_npc_type_levels.py` | Exports NPC trainer type level data |
| `export_trainer_readability.py` | Exports trainer data in human-readable format |
| `fix_encounters.py` | Fixes wild encounter data issues |
| `fix_title_logo.py` | Fixes title screen logo graphics |
| `fix_title_sprite.py` | Fixes title screen sprite graphics |
| `species_reachability_audit.py` | Generates species reachability audit (full/semi/unreachable) with verified reasons for each classification |
